events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`. The staged condition points to a planned noncompliance: ceiling-grid-supported fixtures still need independent support per the fixture listing and NEC 410 installation requirements.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && printf '%s
' '{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"staged\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 0,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",

  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Fixture installation is staged without independent support from the building structure.\",
    \"Ceiling grid alone is not an acceptable support method where independent luminaire support is required by code, listing, submittals, or inspection criteria.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Do not start fixture installation using only the ceiling grid for support.\",
    \"Provide approved independent support wires, rods, brackets, or manufacturer-listed support hardware attached to structure before setting fixtures.\",
    \"Verify support method against NEC 410, fixture listing, project submittals, ceiling system requirements, and local inspector requirements.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The observed staged setup is missing independent luminaire support. The correct method is to install the fixture with approved support independent of the suspended ceiling grid, using listed hardware or support wires fastened to the building structure. Relying on the grid risks fixture displacement or falling, and will not satisfy commercial code/submittal inspection expectations.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 410 - luminaires installed per listing and supported by approved means\",
    \"NEC 410.36 - means of support for luminaires\",
    \"Project submittals and manufacturer installation instructions\"
  ]
}' > /app/answer.json
cat /app/answer.json"
